# OpenBox Docs: LLM-Friendly Index
#
# This file is intended for agents and scrapers that prefer a plain-text sitemap
# with human-readable labels.
#
# Base URL: https://docs.openbox.ai
# Docs base: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/

## Getting Started
- OpenBox Overview: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/
- Getting Started: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/getting-started
- Quick Start: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/getting-started/quick-start
- Temporal Integration Guide: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/getting-started/workflow-engines/temporal

## Agents
- Agents: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents
- Registering Agents: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents/registering-agents
- Trust Lifecycle: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents/trust-lifecycle
- Trust Lifecycle: Assess: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents/trust-lifecycle/assess
- Trust Lifecycle: Authorize: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents/trust-lifecycle/authorize
- Trust Lifecycle: Monitor: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents/trust-lifecycle/monitor
- Trust Lifecycle: Verify: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents/trust-lifecycle/verify
- Trust Lifecycle: Adapt: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/agents/trust-lifecycle/adapt

## Dashboard
- Dashboard: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/dashboard
- Trust Overview: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/dashboard/trust-overview

- Approvals: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/approvals

- Governance Decisions: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/concepts/governance-decisions

- SDK Reference: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/sdk
- SDK Configuration: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/sdk/configuration

## Compliance
- Compliance: https://docs.openbox.ai/docs/compliance
